assignments.name: prompt
assignments.value:
={{ "You are an expert hockey analytics content writer and SEO specialist.

TASK: Write a comprehensive, SEO-optimized blog post about: "" + $json.keyword + ""

REQUIREMENTS:
- Write 1200-1800 words
- Use clear, engaging language suitable for both beginners and analytics enthusiasts
- Include practical examples and real-world applications
- Structure with H2 and H3 headings
- Add actionable insights and key takeaways
- Write in Markdown format
- Use bullet points and numbered lists where appropriate
- Reference real NHL/SHL examples when relevant
- Make it informative, not promotional
- End with a natural CTA section inviting readers to try our AI hockey analytics assistant on the homepage

FORMAT:
SEO_TITLE: [60 characters max - catchy title]
META_DESC: [150-160 characters - compelling description]

# [Article H1 Title - can be longer and more descriptive]

[Engaging introduction paragraph]

## [First H2 Section]

[Content with practical examples]

## [Second H2 Section]

[More content]

## Key Takeaways

- [Takeaway 1]
- [Takeaway 2]
- [Takeaway 3]

## Try Our Hockey Analytics AI

Want to explore hockey analytics further? Try our AI-powered analytics assistant on our homepage. Ask any question about hockey statistics, player performance, or advanced metrics and get instant, data-driven insights. [Visit our homepage](https://thehockeyanalytics.com) to get started." }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "llama-3.3-70b-versatile", messages: [{ role: "system", content: "You are an expert hockey analytics writer with deep knowledge of NHL, SHL, advanced metrics, and data analysis." }, { role: "user", content: ($json.hockeyContext ? $json.hockeyContext + "\n\n" : "") + $json.prompt }], temperature: 0.7, max_tokens: 4000, top_p: 1 }) }}

parameters.url: ={{ 'https://n8n.theunnamedroads.com/webhook/approve-seo-article?action=approve&filename=' + encodeURIComponent($('Generate Approval URLs').item.json.filename) + '&slug=' + encodeURIComponent($('Generate Approval URLs').item.json.slug) + '&keyword=' + encodeURIComponent($('Generate Approval URLs').item.json.keyword) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({chat_id: '-1003919428238', message_thread_id: 4, parse_mode: 'HTML', text: '⚠️ THA artikel under kvalitetsgräns Keyword: ' + $json.keyword + ' Kvalitet: ' + $json.quality_score + '/10 Titel: ' + $json.title + ' Artikeln publicerades INTE automatiskt.'}) }}
